hero.title: Obuggya
hero.lead: IATF ekola mu lujjudde ku bwereere. Okusalawo kwa pulojekiti, enkyukakyuka mu koodi, enkyukakyuka mu bufuzi, n'ebbeeyi y'emirimu biwandiikibwa mu bifo ebya lukale. Olupapula luno lulaga wa buli kika ky'ebiwandiiko we bibeera era n'engeri y'okubisomamu.

items: Okusalawo ku pulojekiti. Ebiragiro ebikwata ku kukkiriza, okutereka, n'okuzza obuggya ebiwandiiko biwandiikibwa ng'ebiwandiiko ebifulumiziddwa mu tterekero erikwata ku nsonga eyo, era ne bifundikirwa mu kiwandiiko ky'abantu bonna. ekiwandiiko. bye bye

Saba ebiwandiiko. Ebiwandiiko by'okusaba eby'olukale biterekebwa mu kitongole kya IATF GitHub, ku kibanja kino, oba byombi. Ebiwandiko biyinza okujuliza, okutereeza, oba okuddaabiriza okusaba okw'olubereberye ne kiba nti obwetaavu bw'obutuukirikika busobola okwekenneenyezebwa awatali kuteekawo bubaka obw'obuntu obwetaagisa. Okusalawo okw'obutakwatagana kunnyonnyolwa mu biwandiiko ebikubibwa mu lujjudde bwe bikwata ku pulojekiti oba okusalawo kw'obukulembeze. Ebyafaayo by'okukusaba tebissibwa mu buwandiike bw'amasoboza aganoonyerezebwako. Okulaba ebiwandiiko: okusaba okufulumizibwa okusooka okulindirira.
Koodi ekyuse. Buli nkyukakyuka ya code eba commit ya bonna ku ggwanika eryenjawulo. Laba IATF Ekibiina kya GitHub. bye bye
Enkyukakyuka mu bufuzi. Ebipya ku lupapula lw'obufuzi birondoolebwa ng'obweyamo eri webusayiti ya iatf Ekifo eky'okuterekamu ebiwandiiko. okuwandiika ebyafaayo ku GitHub.

Ebisale by'emirimu. IATF ekuuma ebisale by'emirimu nga bitono era n'ebiwandiiko ebiddiriŋŋana eby'ebikozesebwa mu by'obutebenkevu by'olukale. Okuviira ddala mu 2022, ebisasiro ebikulu ebiddirira bibadde mannya g'ettaka. Okwanjula kukozesezza ebizimbe eby'obutereevu oba eby'omugaso omutono bwe kiba kisoboka. Laba ebiwandiiko by'ebisale ebikozesebwa wammanga.

Ebiwandiiko by'okukwataganya. Ebiwandiiko okuva mu kwekenneenya kwonna okw'ekikwatagana oba okusalawo bibeera mu GitHub Emboozi ku biwandiiko ebyenjawulo view Okukubaganya ebirowoozo ku webusayiti ya iatf ekifo eky'okuterekamu ebintu.

paragraphs: IATF ekuuma entekateka yaayo ey'olukale nga ntono mu bugenderevu. Okuva mu 2022, ebisale ebikulu eby'emirimu bibadde mannya g'ebitundu. Okwanjula kukozesezza enkola y'entekateka ey'obwereere oba ey'ebbeeyi entono we kisoboka.
Ekiwandiiko kino si lipoota y'ebyensimbi eyeekenneenyezeddwa. Lipoota ya bbeeyi y'ebikozesebwa mu nkola ezikozesebwa okukuuma IATF ku mutimbagano.
operatingCosts.footnote: Ebirango biyinza okulagibwa oba okufulumizibwa oluvannyuma lw'okubivvuunula. Endagiriro z'omuntu ku bubwe, obubaka bw'okusasula, n'ebirala ebiteetaagisa ebikwata ku akaawunti tebiri mu biwandiiko by'abantu bonna.

items.label: Eby'okwetegereza
items.value: Domain cost funded by mugiwarafx. Hosting used free-tier or low-cost infrastructure through Cloudflare. Ekitongole kyava ku Vercel ne kigenda ku CloudFlare era ne kitandika okukozesa akawakatirwa iatf.cc obuyinza.

items.label: Eby'okwetegereza
items.value: Ebisale by'ettaka biyimiriziddwa mugiwarafx. Okukungaanya kukozeseddwa mu by'enkola ey'obwereere oba ey'ebbeeyi entono okuyita mu Vercel.

items.label: Eby'okwetegereza
items.value: Ebisale by'ettaka biyimiriziddwa mugiwarafx. Okwanjula kukozeseddwa mu by'obutonde eby'obwereere oba eby'ebbeeyi entono okuyita mu GitHub Pages.

paragraphs: Obubaka obumu tebufulumizibwa mu biwandiiko by'abantu bonna olw'ekigendererwa:
items: Obuwandiike obw'ekyama obukozesebwa okukkaatiriza okusaba nga tekunnaba kukkirizibwa, kugaanibwa, oba okufundikirwa.
Endagiriro ez'obwannannyini, ennamba z'essimu, n'ebintu ebirala eby'obuntu ebitali bikulu.
Ekintu kyonna ekiyinza okumanyisa omuntu akozesa tekinologiya omuyambi awatali kukkiriza.
Empuliziganya za Raw Discord, okuggyako ng'obubaka obumu busengekeddwa mu buwandiike bwa pulojekiti.

header.title: Enkola y'obufuzi y'ekiragiro ekiri emabega w'ebiwandiiko bino

paragraphs: Bw'oba oyagala okutegeera engeri pulojekiti gye zikkirizibwamu, okuterekebwa, oba okusindikibwa, soma olupapula lw'obufuzi.
